00765|     const chain = batchChain
00766|     const vmType = chain.vmType || 'evm'
00767|     
00768|     console.log('Loading batch tokens for chain:', chain.displayName, 'vmType:', vmType)
00769|     
00770|     // Check if we have the appropriate wallet for this VM type
00771|     if (vmType === 'svm' && !solanaAddress) {
00772|       toast.error('Please connect your Solana wallet to detect tokens')
00773|       return
00774|     }
00775|     
00776|     if ((vmType === 'evm' || vmType === 'hypevm') && !address) {
00777|       toast.error('Please connect your wallet to detect tokens')
00778|       return
00779|     }
00780|     
00781|     setIsLoadingBatchTokens(true)
00782|     try {
00783|       console.log('Fetching currencies for chain:', chain.id)
00784|       
00785|       // Fetch popular tokens that are more likely to have balances
00786|       const fetchedCurrencies = await relayAPI.getCurrencies({
00787|         chainIds: [chain.id],
00788|         defaultList: true,
00789|         limit: 100, // Reduced from 250 to avoid rate limits
00790|       })
00791|       
00792|       console.log('Fetched currencies:', fetchedCurrencies.length)
00793|       
00794|       if (fetchedCurrencies.length === 0) {
00795|         toast.info('No tokens available for this chain')
00796|         return
00797|       }
00798|       
00799|       const tokensWithBalances: WalletToken[] = []
00800|       
00801|       // Handle different VM types
00802|       if (vmType === 'evm' || vmType === 'hypevm') {
00803|         // EVM-based chains
00804|         console.log('Fetching EVM token balances...')
00805|         const { createPublicClient, http, defineChain } = await import('viem')
00806|         
00807|         const chainConfig = defineChain({
00808|           id: chain.id,
00809|           name: chain.displayName,
00810|           nativeCurrency: {
00811|             name: chain.currency.name,
00812|             symbol: chain.currency.symbol,
00813|             decimals: chain.currency.decimals,
00814|           },
00815|           rpcUrls: {
00816|             default: { http: [chain.httpRpcUrl] },
00817|           },
00818|         })
00819|         
00820|         const publicClient = createPublicClient({
00821|           chain: chainConfig,
00822|           transport: http(chain.httpRpcUrl),
00823|         })
00824|         
00825|         const batchSize = 5
00826|         for (let i = 0; i < fetchedCurrencies.length; i += batchSize) {
00827|           const batch = fetchedCurrencies.slice(i, i + batchSize)
00828|           
00829|           const balancePromises = batch.map(async (currency) => {
00830|             try {
00831|               let balance = BigInt(0)
00832|               
00833|               if (currency.metadata?.isNative) {
00834|                 balance = await publicClient.getBalance({
00835|                   address: address as `0x${string}`,
00836|                 })
00837|               } else {
00838|                 balance = await publicClient.readContract({
00839|                   address: currency.address as `0x${string}`,
00840|                   abi: [{
00841|                     name: 'balanceOf',
00842|                     type: 'function',
00843|                     stateMutability: 'view',
00844|                     inputs: [{ name: 'account', type: 'address' }],
00845|                     outputs: [{ name: 'balance', type: 'uint256' }],
00846|                   }],
00847|                   functionName: 'balanceOf',
00848|                   args: [address as `0x${string}`],
00849|                 })
00850|               }
00851|               
00852|               const balanceFormatted = formatUnits(balance, currency.decimals)
00853|               
00854|               if (parseFloat(balanceFormatted) > 0.00000001) {
00855|                 return {
00856|                   token: currency,
00857|                   balance: balance.toString(),
00858|                   balanceFormatted,
00859|                 }
00860|               }
00861|               return null
00862|             } catch (e) {
00863|               return null
00864|             }
00865|           })
00866|           
00867|           const batchResults = await Promise.all(balancePromises)
00868|           const validTokens = batchResults.filter((t): t is WalletToken => t !== null)
00869|           tokensWithBalances.push(...validTokens)
00870|           
00871|           if (tokensWithBalances.length > 0) {
00872|             const sorted = [...tokensWithBalances].sort((a, b) => parseFloat(b.balanceFormatted) - parseFloat(a.balanceFormatted))
00873|             setWalletTokens(sorted)
00874|             setBatchTokens(sorted.slice(0, 10))
00875|           }
00876|         }
00877|       } else if (vmType === 'svm') {
00878|         // Solana-based chains
00879|         console.log('Fetching Solana token balances for address:', solanaAddress)
00880|         
00881|         if (!solanaAddress) {
00882|           throw new Error('Solana wallet not connected')
00883|         }
00884|         
00885|         const solanaRpcUrl = chain.httpRpcUrl
00886|         
00887|         for (const currency of fetchedCurrencies) {
00888|           try {
00889|             let balance = BigInt(0)
00890|             
00891|             if (currency.metadata?.isNative || currency.address === '0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000') {
00892|               // Native SOL balance
00893|               const response = await fetch(solanaRpcUrl, {
00894|                 method: 'POST',
00895|                 headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
00896|                 body: JSON.stringify({
00897|                   jsonrpc: '2.0',
00898|                   id: 1,
00899|                   method: 'getBalance',
00900|                   params: [solanaAddress]
00901|                 })
00902|               })
00903|               
00904|               const data = await response.json()
00905|               if (data.result && data.result.value !== undefined) {
00906|                 balance = BigInt(data.result.value)
00907|               }
00908|             } else {
00909|               // SPL token balance
00910|               const response = await fetch(solanaRpcUrl, {
00911|                 method: 'POST',
00912|                 headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
00913|                 body: JSON.stringify({
00914|                   jsonrpc: '2.0',
00915|                   id: 1,
00916|                   method: 'getTokenAccountsByOwner',
00917|                   params: [
00918|                     solanaAddress,
00919|                     { mint: currency.address },
00920|                     { encoding: 'jsonParsed' }
00921|                   ]
00922|                 })
00923|               })
00924|               
00925|               const data = await response.json()
00926|               if (data.result && data.result.value && data.result.value.length > 0) {
00927|                 const tokenAccount = data.result.value[0]
00928|                 balance = BigInt(tokenAccount.account.data.parsed.info.tokenAmount.amount)
00929|               }
00930|             }
00931|             
00932|             const balanceFormatted = formatUnits(balance, currency.decimals)
00933|             
00934|             if (parseFloat(balanceFormatted) > 0.00000001) {
00935|               tokensWithBalances.push({
00936|                 token: currency,
00937|                 balance: balance.toString(),
00938|                 balanceFormatted,
00939|               })
00940|             }
00941|           } catch (e) {
00942|             console.error(`Failed to fetch Solana balance for ${currency.symbol}:`, e)
00943|           }
00944|         }
00945|         
00946|         if (tokensWithBalances.length > 0) {
00947|           const sorted = tokensWithBalances.sort((a, b) => parseFloat(b.balanceFormatted) - parseFloat(a.balanceFormatted))
00948|           setWalletTokens(sorted)
00949|           setBatchTokens(sorted.slice(0, 10))
00950|         }
00951|       } else {
00952|         // Unsupported VM type (bvm, tvm, etc.)
00953|         console.log(`VM type ${vmType} not yet supported for batch token detection`)
00954|         toast.info(`Batch swap for ${chain.displayName} (${vmType}) requires manual token selection`)
00955|         setIsLoadingBatchTokens(false)
00956|         return
00957|       }
00958|       
00959|       console.log('Tokens with balances found:', tokensWithBalances.length)
00960|       
00961|       const sorted = tokensWithBalances.sort((a, b) => parseFloat(b.balanceFormatted) - parseFloat(a.balanceFormatted))
00962|       
00963|       setWalletTokens(sorted)
00964|       setBatchTokens(sorted.slice(0, 10))
00965|       
00966|       if (activeTab === 'batch') {
00967|         if (tokensWithBalances.length > 0) {
00968|           toast.success(`Found ${tokensWithBalances.length} tokens with balance`)
00969|         } else {
00970|           toast.info('No tokens with balance found. Try a different chain or add tokens manually.')
00971|         }
00972|       }
00973|     } catch (error) {
00974|       console.error('=== Failed to load wallet tokens ===')
00975|       console.error('Error details:', error)
00976|       console.error('Error message:', error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error')
00977|       console.error('Error stack:', error instanceof Error ? error.stack : 'No stack trace')
00978|       console.error('Chain:', chain.displayName, 'ID:', chain.id)
00979|       console.error('Address:', address)
00980|       console.error('====================================')
00981|       
00982|       const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error occurred'
00983|       toast.error(`Failed to load wallet tokens: ${errorMessage}`)
00984|     } finally {
00985|       setIsLoadingBatchTokens(false)
00986|     }
00987|   }
00988| 
00989|   const searchTokenByContract = async (contractAddress: string) => {
00990|     if (!contractAddress) {
00991|       toast.error('Please enter a contract address')
00992|       return
00993|     }
